# [clang][x86-64] Assertion failure in InitListExpr::getInit (“Initializer access out of range!”)

**Author:** BKUS21
**URL:** https://github.com/llvm/llvm-project/issues/149111
**Status:** Closed
**Labels:** duplicate, clang:frontend, crash, generated by fuzzer, regression:17
**Closed Date:** 2025-07-16T15:42:17Z
